summary_one_line: Input must build a MATH table whose Device.format field equals a valid case (1/2/3/0x8000), avoiding the default switch arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed sfnt with a MATH table reaching a Device record (via MathValueRecord.get_x_value -> base+deviceTable get_x_delta) whose 16-bit u.b.format field equals one of the recognized switch cases 1, 2, 3, or 0x8000, so the switch in get_x_delta dispatches to a real format arm instead of falling through to the `default:` (line 3569), thereby taking the false side of that default branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry a structured sfnt header (00 01 00 00 at 0x00) and the literal 'MATH' tag (4d 41 54 48) at offset 0x0c, plus device-record bytes producing format values 1/2/3; the per-role overlay shows winner seeds reach OT::Device::sanitize and MathValueRecord::sanitize (W=712/1130 vs L=0) and execute case 1/2/3 (line 3562 T-side hit only under W), confirming a valid Device.format reaches the switch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short and lack the MATH-table structure (6-byte '87 0e 0d 0e 22 0e', 13-byte, 27-byte garbage with no 'MATH' tag at 0x0c); they never invoke OT::Device::sanitize / MathValueRecord::sanitize (L hits = 0) and only ever take the default arm (L true=140 at line 3569), so the format field is never set to a valid case value.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace intercepts the format comparison (switch lowered to integer CMPs against 1/2/3/0x8000) and the 'MATH' tag memcmp, captures the constant operands, and substitutes them directly into the input at the matched offsets; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace so they must hit the exact 16-bit format constant and 4-byte tag by chance, which they fail to do within budget.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the default arm of a switch on u.b.format, and the globally blocked side is the false branch.
The switch dispatches on u.b.format with recognized cases 1/2/3 and 0x8000 before the default blocker.
Case 1/2/3 is the format arm whose taking corresponds to leaving the default; winners hit it, losers never do.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L3562  T=5 F=72  T=0 F=140  case 1: case 2: case 3:

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds carry the literal 'MATH' table tag, evidence of valid table structure reaching the Device switch.
Winner-resolving seeds were discovered by value_profile_cmplog.
Winner seeds invoke OT::Device::sanitize while loser seeds never do (W=712 L=0).
Winner seeds invoke MathValueRecord::sanitize while loser seeds never do (W=1130 L=0).
Loser-blocking seeds are short and unstructured, lacking the MATH-table layout.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: Seed 1 (id=003817559785f774, size=6 bytes, fuzzer=naive, trial=1, discovered_at=0s, mutation_op=ByteDecMutator,WordAddMutator):

evidence_trail.claim: At the default blocker line, losers always take the true (blocking) side; winners reach the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L3569  T=61 F=16  T=140 F=0  default:  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog/vpc add I2SRandReplace, which substitutes a captured CMP operand at matching input offsets; naive lacks it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile (loser in pair 1) has no I2SRandReplace, so absence of the dash signal distinguishes it.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5492 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 4f05c78f8adde3c2`; the chain has 20 ancestor levels and the trailing I2S-floor signal reports 1 dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 19. Per the cmplog/vpc mechanism note, a dash row in a vpc-discovered seed's ancestor chain is lower-bound evidence of an I2SRandReplace find (it is I2S-exclusive versus naive/value_profile, the two losers here).

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a switch on a parsed 16-bit format field reaching this default arm shows cmplog/vpc NOT resolving the valid-case false side faster than naive/value_profile (no I2S advantage), which would refute that an I2S magic-number/tag substitution is the divergence cause.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact device-record offset that holds the winning format value is not pinned in the byte diff; I infer the format-constant requirement from the switch source and sanitize-function hit divergence rather than a single concentrated W-vs-L format byte.
